Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover

Class TacticDescriptors.CombinedTacticDescriptor

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.TacticDescriptors.AbstractTacticDescriptor
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.TacticDescriptors.CombinedTacticDescriptor
All Implemented Interfaces:
ICombinedTacticDescriptor, ITacticDescriptor
Enclosing class:
TacticDescriptors
public static class TacticDescriptors.CombinedTacticDescriptor extends TacticDescriptors.AbstractTacticDescriptor implements ICombinedTacticDescriptor

  • Constructor Details

    • CombinedTacticDescriptor

      public CombinedTacticDescriptor(String id, String name, String description, ITacticCombinator combinator, String combinatorId, List<ITacticDescriptor> combinedDescs)

  • Method Details

    • getTacticInstance

      public ITactic getTacticInstance()
      Description copied from interface: ITacticDescriptor
      Returns the singleton instance of the tactic corresponding to the tactic extension.

      Before requesting an instance, callers must ensure that this descriptor is instantiable (see ITacticDescriptor.isInstantiable()). Otherwise, an UnsupportedOperationException is thrown. In case there is a problem instantiating the tactic class, an IllegalStateException is thrown.

      Specified by:
      getTacticInstance in interface ITacticDescriptor
      Returns:
      an instance of the tactic

    • getCombinatorId

      public String getCombinatorId()
      Description copied from interface: ICombinedTacticDescriptor
      Returns the id of the combinator used to make the described tactic.
      Specified by:
      getCombinatorId in interface ICombinedTacticDescriptor
      Returns:
      a combinator id

    • getCombinedTactics

      public List<ITacticDescriptor> getCombinedTactics()
      Description copied from interface: ICombinedTacticDescriptor
      Returns the list of combined tactics.
      Specified by:
      getCombinedTactics in interface ICombinedTacticDescriptor
      Returns:
      a list of tactic descriptors
